item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: At one point toward the end of the first half of the match between Spain and Cape Verde on Monday afternoon, it became apparent that Vozinha, the Cape Verde goalkeeper, was up for the challenge of facing one of the most talented, successful teams in the world

media:content.media:text: Vozinha raises the Cape Verde flag while standing on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Vozinha of Cape Verde celebrates with the flag of Cabo Verde during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group H match against Spain on June 15, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Vozinha of Cape Verde makes a save against Spain on June 15, 2026 in Atlanta.
media:content.media:description: Vozinha makes a save against Spain on Monday.

item.title: Meet the 40-year-old goalkeeper who blanked Spain in Cape Verde’s historic draw

item.description: Guti y Valdano analizan a profundidad las carencias que demostró España en su empate 0-0 con Cabo Verde, encendiendo alarmas a tiempo. Mientras tanto, Julio Dely Valdés nos habla del empate de Uruguay con Arabia Saudita y las dudas que provocaron.

media:content.media:title: ¿Por qué España y Uruguay no pudieron ganar en su debut mundialista?
media:content.media:description: Guti y Valdano analizan a profundidad las carencias que demostró España en su empate 0-0 con Cabo Verde, encendiendo alarmas a tiempo. Mientras tanto, Julio Dely Valdés nos habla del empate de Uruguay con Arabia Saudita y las dudas que provocaron.

item.title: ¿Por qué España y Uruguay no pudieron ganar en su debut mundialista?

item.description: En un electrizante partido de alta intensidad, Irán y Nueva Zelanda empataron 2-2 en el Grupo G. Elijah Just fue la gran figura con un doblete para los neozelandeses, pero los iraníes respondieron para sumar un valioso punto.

media:content.media:title: Irán y Nueva Zelanda protagonizan un partidazo con cuatro goles
media:content.media:description: En un electrizante partido de alta intensidad, Irán y Nueva Zelanda empataron 2-2 en el Grupo G. Elijah Just fue la gran figura con un doblete para los neozelandeses, pero los iraníes respondieron para sumar un valioso punto.

item.title: Irán y Nueva Zelanda protagonizan un partidazo con cuatro goles

item.description: Uruguay debutó en el Mundial con un empate 1-1 ante Arabia Saudita en Miami. La Celeste reaccionó en el tramo final tras ir abajo en el marcador y estuvo cerca del triunfo, pero el arquero saudí evitó el gol de Federico Valverde.

media:content.media:title: Todo el Mundial | Uruguay reaccionó al final y rescató un empate en Miami
media:content.media:description: Uruguay debutó en el Mundial con un empate 1-1 ante Arabia Saudita en Miami. La Celeste reaccionó en el tramo final tras ir abajo en el marcador y estuvo cerca del triunfo, pero el arquero saudí evitó el gol de Federico Valverde.

item.title: Todo el Mundial | Uruguay reaccionó al final y rescató un empate en Miami

item.description: España empató 0-0 ante Cabo Verde, que sumó un punto histórico en su estreno en una Copa del Mundo. Vuzinha fue la figura del partido con atajadas decisivas. Yamal, Williams y Olmo ingresaron en el complemento, pero no pudieron cambiar la historia.

media:content.media:title: Todo el Mundial | España no pudo con Cabo Verde en su debut mundialista
media:content.media:description: España empató 0-0 ante Cabo Verde, que sumó un punto histórico en su estreno en una Copa del Mundo. Vuzinha fue la figura del partido con atajadas decisivas. Yamal, Williams y Olmo ingresaron en el complemento, pero no pudieron cambiar la historia.

item.title: Todo el Mundial | España no pudo con Cabo Verde en su debut mundialista

item.description: El director técnico de la Selección de Argentina asegura que dejarán todo en el cancha y que es muy complicado ganar una Copa Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Lionel Scaloni: “Este equipo no ha perdido el hambre de ganar”
media:content.media:description: El director técnico de la Selección de Argentina asegura que dejarán todo en el cancha y que es muy complicado ganar una Copa Mundial.

item.title: Lionel Scaloni: “Este equipo no ha perdido el hambre de ganar”

item.description: Miles de argentinos se reunieron en Kansas City para arrancar la fiesta mundialista, rumbo al debut ante Argelia de este martes. Con las imágenes de Leo Messi y Maradona en lo alto, la hinchada “Albiceleste” coloreó toda la ciudad.

media:content.media:title: Kansas City es Albiceleste! Impresionante banderazo de Argentina previo al debut de la selección
media:content.media:description: Miles de argentinos se reunieron en Kansas City para arrancar la fiesta mundialista, rumbo al debut ante Argelia de este martes. Con las imágenes de Leo Messi y Maradona en lo alto, la hinchada “Albiceleste” coloreó toda la ciudad.

item.title: Kansas City es Albiceleste! Impresionante banderazo de Argentina previo al debut de la selección

item.description: España no pudo vencer a Cabo Verde en su debut mundialista. Bélgica y Uruguay también cedieron puntos en una jornada llena de sorpresas en la Copa del Mundo 2026.

media:content.media:title: España tropieza y los favoritos siguen sin despegar
media:content.media:description: España no pudo vencer a Cabo Verde en su debut mundialista. Bélgica y Uruguay también cedieron puntos en una jornada llena de sorpresas en la Copa del Mundo 2026.

item.title: España tropieza y los favoritos siguen sin despegar

item.description: En Voces del Mundial, el partido de Uruguay vs Arabia Saudita se llevó los reflectores por un empate en los últimos minutos de los ‘Charrúas’, pero para el equipo sudamericano fue un partido con ‘sabor a derrota’. En Arabia celebran el resultado.

media:content.media:title: Bielsa reconoce fracaso en el debut y el capitán Valverde comparte la frustración
media:content.media:description: En Voces del Mundial, el partido de Uruguay vs Arabia Saudita se llevó los reflectores por un empate en los últimos minutos de los ‘Charrúas’, pero para el equipo sudamericano fue un partido con ‘sabor a derrota’. En Arabia celebran el resultado.

item.title: Bielsa reconoce fracaso en el debut y el capitán Valverde comparte la frustración

item.description: Mohammad Mohebbi igualó 2-2 para Irán ante Nueva Zelanda con un potente cabezazo que pegó en el poste antes de entrar. El atacante aprovechó un centro preciso para devolver la esperanza a los iraníes en un partido lleno de emociones. K: Deportes,Mun

media:content.media:title: Mohebbi empata para Irán con un cabezazo espectacular
media:content.media:description: Mohammad Mohebbi igualó 2-2 para Irán ante Nueva Zelanda con un potente cabezazo que pegó en el poste antes de entrar. El atacante aprovechó un centro preciso para devolver la esperanza a los iraníes en un partido lleno de emociones. K: Deportes,Mun

item.title: Mohebbi empata para Irán con un cabezazo espectacular

item.description: La selección uruguaya intentó ganar el partido hasta el último momento, pero tuvo que conformarse con el 1-1 ante los saudíes. El primer gol fue de Abdulelah Al-Amri y el empate corrió a cargo de Maxi Araújo, en un frenético arranque del Grupo H.

media:content.media:title: Uruguay divide puntos con Arabia Saudita en su primer partido del Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: La selección uruguaya intentó ganar el partido hasta el último momento, pero tuvo que conformarse con el 1-1 ante los saudíes. El primer gol fue de Abdulelah Al-Amri y el empate corrió a cargo de Maxi Araújo, en un frenético arranque del Grupo H.

item.title: Uruguay divide puntos con Arabia Saudita en su primer partido del Mundial 2026

item.description: Vice President JD Vance spoke with NBC News' Tom Llamas about the announcement of a deal being reached between the U.S. and Iran to end the war in the Middle East. Vance said that nuclear inspectors will be allowed back into Iran under the agreement, as a signing ceremony is set to be held in Switzerland.

media:content.media:title: Vance says nuclear inspectors will return to Iran under terms to end war
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance spoke with NBC News' Tom Llamas about the announcement of a deal being reached between the U.S. and Iran to end the war in the Middle East. Vance said that nuclear inspectors will be allowed back into Iran under the agreement, as a signing ceremony is set to be held in Switzerland.

item.title: Vance says nuclear inspectors will return to Iran under terms to end war

item.dc:creator: Peter Nicholas
item.description: Trump will touch down in France for the G7 meeting with allies who are at odds with him over a pair of wars.

media:content.media:text: Trump Signs Order Directing Customs Crackdown Amid Trade Gaps
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump during an executive order signing in the Oval Office of the White House in Washington, DC, US, on Wednesday, June 3, 2026. Trump signed an executive order designed to tighten customs enforcement, his latest move to ramp up protectionist trade policies.

item.title: Trump to face European allies at odds with him over two wars at G7 summit

item.description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials. A document signing is expected to take place Friday. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports on the details of the deal for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US and Iran Reach Framework Deal to End War, Reopen Hormuz
media:content.media:description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials. A document signing is expected to take place Friday. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports on the details of the deal for TODAY.

item.title: US and Iran Reach Framework Deal to End War, Reopen Hormuz

item.description: A U.S. official confirmed to NBC News that all onboard were killed. The B-52 Stratofortress crashed shortly at takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz reports.

media:content.media:title: Eight dead after B-52 bomber crashes at California military base
media:content.media:description: A U.S. official confirmed to NBC News that all onboard were killed. The B-52 Stratofortress crashed shortly at takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz reports.

item.title: Eight dead after B-52 bomber crashes at California military base

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: After it launches in August, NASA’s Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope is expected to survey more of the sky than any space telescope before, at a pace hundreds of times faster.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Left: the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope in the clean room. Right: a Lego model of Nancy Grace Roman, a pioneer of modern space-based astronomy after whom NASA named its next-generation telescope in 2020.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: A panorama of the Andromeda galaxy.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Left: A Goddard employee performs final checks on the Roman telescope in the clean room; right: a clock counts down the time remaining until the observatory is launched into space.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

item.title: 1,000 times faster than Hubble: Up close with the NASA telescope meant to unlock the cosmos

item.description: James Barker, an executive producer on "Love Island USA," died while the show was filming in Fiji. According to ITV America and Peacock, Barker died after suffering an unexpected medical emergency. NBC News' Chloe Melas discusses the reaction from those who knew him and how the show will honor him.

media:content.media:title: 'Love Island USA' executive producer dies in Fiji while filming, networks say
media:content.media:description: James Barker, an executive producer on "Love Island USA," died while the show was filming in Fiji. According to ITV America and Peacock, Barker died after suffering an unexpected medical emergency. NBC News' Chloe Melas discusses the reaction from those who knew him and how the show will honor him.

item.title: 'Love Island USA' executive producer dies in Fiji while filming, networks say

item.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Alabama, California, D.C., Georgia and Oklahoma, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

media:content.media:title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results
media:content.media:description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Alabama, California, D.C., Georgia and Oklahoma, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

item.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
Maya Rosenberg
item.description: A federal judge in Florida ordered a teenager to remain behind bars until his trial in the sexual assault and murder of his stepsister aboard a cruise ship last year, according to court records unsealed Monday

media:content.media:text: Cruise Industry Helps Tourism To Be Back On Track In Portugal With Record Visits To The Country
media:content.media:description: A Carnival cruise ship

media:content.media:text: Anna Kepner takes a selfie in a mirror
media:content.media:description: Anna Kepner.

item.title: Judge orders teen accused of killing his stepsister on a cruise to be held in jail

item.dc:creator: Alicia Victoria Lozano
item.description: Three men have been charged with homicide in the rope-jumping death of a woman who plunged more than 130 feet off a bridge in Limeira, Brazil, without being properly secured to any equipment

media:content.media:text: A view of a bridge as seen from a highway
media:content.media:description: The Ponte do Esqueleto (Skeleton Bridge) in Sao Paulo, Brazil.

item.title: Three instructors charged in bridge-jumping death of woman not secured to rope

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: The vice president, in an interview with NBC News, also said text of the memorandum of understanding between the U.S. and Iran won’t be released until Friday.

media:content.media:text: Vice President JD Vance speaks to Nightly News' Tom Llamas on June 15, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance speaks to Nightly News' Tom Llamas on June 15, 2026.

item.title: Vance says nuclear inspectors ‘absolutely’ will return to Iran under terms to end war

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: After it launches in August, NASA’s Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope is expected to survey more of the sky than any space telescope before, at a pace hundreds of times faster.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope

media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Left: the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope in the clean room. Right: a Lego model of Nancy Grace Roman, a pioneer of modern space-based astronomy after whom NASA named its next-generation telescope in 2020.

item.title: 1,000 times faster than Hubble: Up close with the NASA telescope meant to unlock the cosmos

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail

media:content.media:text: Fireworks during the UFC Freedom250 fight on the South Lawn of the White House.
media:content.media:description: Fireworks during the UFC Freedom250 fight on the South Lawn of the White House in Washington, DC, US, early on Monday, June 15, 2026.

item.title: 3 takeaways from our new poll: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Shabad
item.description: The disqualified Senate candidate, who’s a Republican, has 30 days to appeal the decision. Ballots are being printed June 28 for the Aug. 18 primary election.

media:content.media:text: Alaska Senate candidate Dan Sullivan, one of the challengers to the incumbent senator, also named Dan Sullivan, during a hike, Sunday, June 7, 2026, on Kupreanof Island, near Petersburg, Alaska.
media:content.media:description: Alaska Senate candidate Dan Sullivan, one of the challengers to the incumbent senator, also named Dan Sullivan, during a hike on Kupreanof Island, near Petersburg, Alaska.

media:content.media:text: Dan Sullivan
media:content.media:description: Alaska Senate candidate Dan Sullivan, one of the challengers to the incumbent senator, also named Dan Sullivan, during a hike on Kupreanof Island, near Petersburg, Alaska.

item.title: Only one Dan Sullivan is left standing in Alaska’s Senate race

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
Corky Siemaszko
Mosheh Gains
item.description: Eight people are presumed dead after a B-52 bomber crashed Monday at Edwards Air Force Base in California

media:content.media:text: Edwards Air Force Base, Calif., on February 24, 2017.
media:content.media:description: Edwards Air Force Base, Calif., on February 24, 2017.

item.title: 8 presumed dead after Air Force bomber crashes on takeoff at California base
